name: agents-schema
description: Connect to a data warehouse and discover metadata through its AGENTS schema.

interface.shortDescription: Connect to warehouses and search Agents Schema.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Snowflake, BigQuery, or Databricks, then use the warehouse-native AGENTS schema to discover provider metadata.
defaultPrompt: Help me connect to my data warehouse.
Use Agents Schema to answer this warehouse question.
